title: L-04 fixture
description: Pre-built mulmoScript for L-04 animation:true regression. One short html_tailwind beat with animation:true exercises the per-frame Puppeteer screenshot + ffmpeg compose path that B-46 broke. Empty `text` skips TTS so the test stays self-contained (no GEMINI_API_KEY needed). One beat keeps the wall time well below the L-03 ceiling.

html: <div class='h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-purple-600'>
L-04 Animation
script: animation.animate('#title', { opacity: [0, 1], scale: [0.8, 1] }, { start: 0, end: 1, easing: 'easeOut' });
